sourcesContent:
// src/components/Dashboard.jsx /** * Responsiveness: * - Sidebar collapses to a hamburger menu on mobile devices (< 768px). * - Stat cards use an auto-fit grid to adjust naturally across all screen sizes. * - Entire layout relies fully on global media queries defined in src/index.css. */ import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Menu, Search, Bell, Users, BookOpen, Briefcase, Settings, LogOut, Home, Key } from 'lucide-react'; /** * @typedef {Object} StatData * @property {string} label - The label for the statistic card * @property {string|number} value - The numeric or string value to display * @property {React.ReactNode} icon - The lucide-react icon component */ /** * @typedef {Object} DashboardProps * @property {string} userName - The authenticated user's name * @property {StatData[]} stats - The summary statistics to display in cards * @property {Function} onRoleAssign - Form submission callback. Returns { email, role } * @property {Function} onLogout - Callback when the logout button is clicked */ /** * Main Dashboard Component * @param {DashboardProps} props */ export default function Dashboard({ userName, stats, onRoleAssign, onLogout }) { const [isSidebarOpen, setIsSidebarOpen] = useState(false); const [isSearchFocused, setIsSearchFocused] = useState(false); // Controlled form state const [email, setEmail] = useState(''); const [role, setRole] = useState('student'); const toggleSidebar = () => { setIsSidebarOpen(prev => !prev); }; const handleRoleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (onRoleAssign) { onRoleAssign({ email, role }); setEmail(''); setRole('student'); } }; return (
{/* Sidebar */}
University HRMS
{/* Main Content */}
setIsSearchFocused(true)} onBlur={() => setIsSearchFocused(false)} />
Welcome, {userName || 'User'}

Overview

{/* Statistical Cards */}
{stats && stats.map((stat, i) => (
{stat.icon}

{stat.label}

{stat.value}

))}
{/* Controlled Role Assignment Form */}

Assign Role

setEmail(e.target.value)} required />
); }
